Interface ITransposeBitsFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster

ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control Transpose Bits function arguments.

[Guid("491417FA-9959-4BE9-80AF-CA9E7C74BF32")]

public interface ITransposeBitsFunctionArguments
